subject: Implement policy element convertion during onboarding VSP
commit_message:
Implement policy element convertion during onboarding VSP

Implement absent policy convertion.

Add test data for policies section convertion and
explicit test for checking if policies been converted.

Change-Id: I7d431a22922e1f9da0fbf0de4654995c3da42fcb
Issue-ID: SDC-2727
Signed-off-by: Dmitry Puzikov <d.puzikov2@partner.samsung.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/sdc-master-verify-java/5374/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/sdc-master-verify-java/5374

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1

Please add or modify some unit tests so the functions you added are covered.
Also so we have assertion that one policy exists with the mock MainServiceTemplate

Patch Set 2:

> Patch Set 1: Code-Review-1
> 
> Please add or modify some unit tests so the functions you added are covered.
> Also so we have assertion that one policy exists with the mock MainServiceTemplate

I've added explicit test to check if policies been converted. 
Even without it added functions were (indirectly) covered by org.openecomp.core.impl.ToscaConverterImplTest#testConvertMainSt by adding policies section to existing templates.
